def negative_module_singleton_client_side_effect():
    rule_id = "module_singleton_client_side_effect"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Eagerly constructed network, database, or cloud clients bound at module scope."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
